name: Ophis
description: Ophis is an intent-based DEX aggregator with a natural-language layer. This APIs.json index lists its machine-readable APIs: the public Intent API (natural language to structured swap intent) and the keyless MCP server that lets AI agents quote, build, and relay non-custodial swaps.

apis.name: Ophis Intent API
apis.description: Turns a natural-language swap request (for example "swap 100 USDC for ETH on Optimism") into a structured intent with recognized entities. Public, keyless, rate-limited to 30 requests per minute per IP.

apis.name: Ophis MCP Server
apis.description: Keyless Model Context Protocol server (Streamable-HTTP) exposing six tools (parse_intent, get_quote, build_order, submit_order, lookup_tier, list_chains) so AI agents can quote and build non-custodial, gasless, MEV-protected swaps across 11 EVM chains. The server holds no keys and never signs.
